docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF DAVID NAH IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DONALD BRITTAN. DEFENDANT JAIME ORTIZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PILAR ESPINOZA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, JAIME
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.
